h1: How strategic design shapes strong modern brand experiences
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Strategic design empowers brands to communicate clearly, grow consistently, and build meaningful audience connections.

Strategic design helps brands communicate with clarity, build trust, and differentiate in competitive markets. It aligns visuals, messaging, and purpose to create experiences that feel consistent and memorable.

A strong strategy begins with understanding the audience, market position, and long-term vision. Designers analyze goals, user behavior, and brand tone to create a clear direction. These foundations guide every decision, ensuring the brand stays recognizable, aligned, and ready to scale across all communication channels.

Once strategy is defined, designers craft visuals that communicate the story effectively. Typography, color, layout, and imagery work together to form a cohesive identity. High-quality execution ensures the brand feels polished, engaging, and trustworthy, helping businesses strengthen their presence across digital and physical touchpoints.

/journal/why-minimalist-design-helps-bra.title: Why minimalist design helps brands communicate with more clarity - My Framer Site
/journal/why-minimalist-design-helps-bra.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h1: Why minimalist design helps brands communicate with more clarity
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Minimalist design removes distractions, helping brands deliver clear, meaningful messages that audiences understand quickly.

Minimalist design focuses on clarity, simplicity, and purpose. By removing unnecessary elements, brands communicate messages more effectively and create cleaner, more memorable visual experiences. This approach strengthens brand identity and improves user understanding across platforms.

Minimal design helps users concentrate on what matters most. With fewer distractions, brands highlight key messages, improving readability and user engagement. This approach ensures interfaces feel modern, intuitive, and easier to navigate, supporting stronger customer interactions and better overall communication.

Effective minimalism isn’t about removing design — it’s about making intentional choices. Designers use balanced spacing, thoughtful typography, and clean layouts to create elegant experiences. These decisions help brands appear more premium, trustworthy, and focused, all while delivering clear visual communication users can instantly understand.

/journal/how-strong-brand-identity-impro.title: How strong brand identity improves business growth and recognition - My Framer Site
/journal/how-strong-brand-identity-impro.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h1: How strong brand identity improves business growth and recognition
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: A strong brand identity communicates values clearly, helping businesses grow with trust and recognition.

Brand identity represents how a brand looks, feels, and communicates. A cohesive identity helps audiences understand a brand’s personality instantly and builds long-term loyalty. Clear visuals and messaging create deeper emotional connections with customers.

A strong identity includes logos, colors, typography, and messaging working together seamlessly. Designers create guidelines to maintain consistency across print, digital, and social platforms. This uniformity strengthens recognition and builds a reliable brand presence everywhere.

When identity is clear and memorable, customers trust the brand more easily. This leads to better conversions, stronger loyalty, and improved marketing performance. A well-designed identity becomes a foundation for long-term business growth and competitive advantage.

/journal/how-user-experience-design-impr.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h1: How user experience design improves brand communication and trust
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Great user experience strengthens trust by making interactions simple, consistent, and enjoyable across touchpoints.

User experience design shapes how people feel when interacting with a brand. Clear layouts, smooth navigation, and purposeful structure help users achieve goals easily. This builds trust and encourages long-lasting engagement with the brand.

The foundation of UX begins with understanding user behavior, motivations, and pain points. Designers conduct research to define user expectations and create solutions that feel intuitive and comfortable. A well-informed UX approach ensures digital experiences feel smooth and familiar, improving satisfaction and performance.

Once insights are gathered, designers create layouts that simplify actions and emphasize clarity. Clean interfaces, logical flows, and accessible design principles ensure users feel confident completing tasks. This enhances trust and supports consistent engagement across websites, apps, and digital products.

h1: Why good web design is essential for today’s digital businesses
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Good web design improves user experience, builds trust, and supports business goals across digital platforms.

A well-designed website is often a customer’s first impression of a brand. Clean structure, clear messaging, and thoughtful visuals help users understand the brand quickly and navigate effortlessly, leading to better engagement.

Designers build layouts that guide users through content naturally. With balanced sections, readable typography, and strong visual hierarchy, websites become easier to explore. This approach reduces confusion and encourages deeper interaction with the brand’s offering.

Professional design elements—consistent branding, strong visuals, and intentional spacing—make websites feel reliable. When users trust the design, they are more likely to stay longer, explore more pages, and convert. Good design directly supports business success.

/journal/the-power-of-color-psychology-i.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h1: The power of color psychology in building strong brand identity
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Color psychology influences emotions, helping brands create memorable, meaningful, and visually recognizable identities.

Color plays a powerful role in shaping brand perception. Selecting the right palette helps convey personality, emotion, and message. When used thoughtfully, color strengthens recognition and makes brand experiences more connected and engaging.

Designers study brand values, audience emotions, and industry context when selecting colors. Each choice carries meaning, helping audiences understand the brand instantly. A well-balanced palette enhances consistency, improves communication, and supports long-term recognition across all touchpoints.

Color becomes even more powerful when integrated into digital design. Buttons, backgrounds, typography, and images work together to guide user attention. When applied correctly, color enhances usability, supports visual hierarchy, and shapes a unique, memorable brand experience for every viewer.

h1: How digital strategy helps brands grow more effectively online
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Digital strategy guides brands with clear direction, helping them achieve goals and grow effectively.

Digital strategy combines research, planning, and creativity to help brands thrive online. It ensures every decision aligns with long-term goals and supports consistent growth across platforms and channels.

A digital strategy begins by understanding audience needs, market challenges, and brand objectives. Designers and strategists work together to define a roadmap that guides messaging, design, and content choices. This approach keeps the brand focused and aligned.

Execution turns planning into real results. Consistent visuals, messaging, and digital actions create a stronger presence online. When everything works together, brands grow faster, engage more users, and build a clear identity across all digital touchpoints.

/portfolio/vera-athletica.title: Vera Athletica - My Framer Site
/portfolio/vera-athletica.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Vera Athletica is a women-led sportswear brand empowering movement through high-performance apparel and elevated design. Our role was to capture that energy across every visual and digital element of the brand.

We shaped a bold yet refined identity rooted in balance — strength and softness, performance and grace. The logotype is custom-built to feel agile and structured, with lettering that suggests motion even at rest. A dynamic system of secondary marks and brand elements supports versatility across packaging, social campaigns, and physical merchandising. Color choices center around a muted core palette, energized with vibrant seasonal accents to keep pace with collection drops. The overall identity gives Vera Athletica the presence of a premium brand without losing the authenticity and rawness that defines its message.

For the digital rollout, we crafted a storytelling-first experience that celebrates both the product and the people wearing it. The homepage acts as a manifesto — celebrating real women, real bodies, and real movement. Each product page is built like a visual editorial: large-scale photography, functional detailing, and community testimonials co-exist within a fluid layout. We also introduced animated type and motion-based transitions to bring rhythm and intensity to the user journey, echoing the brand’s connection to sport. The end result is a brand universe that feels active, inclusive, and ready to lead.

/portfolio/campus.title: Campus - My Framer Site
/portfolio/campus.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Nord Traverse designs and sells high-performance gear and apparel for mountain athletes. The objective was to give them a digital presence that matched their commitment to technical precision and wild terrain.

The website was built as an immersive extension of the brand’s values—resilience, elevation, and raw beauty. We leaned into bold visuals and spacious layouts to mirror the vastness of the environments their gear is made for. The structure is intuitive and purpose-driven, designed to guide users through categories without breaking the sense of adventure. Product pages highlight technical specs with clarity while weaving in storytelling moments that link design to performance. The typography system balances utilitarianism with flair, echoing the engineering behind every item Nord Traverse sells. All motion was kept deliberate and slow—like the pace of a high-altitude climb—prioritizing focus over flash.

To support conversion without diluting the experience, we integrated subtle e-commerce cues—sticky product previews, hover states for quick specs, and layered product imagery that shows texture and use in context. The mobile design rethinks the user journey with thumb-friendly filters and collapsible content to make exploration seamless on any device. Beyond the shop, the site features a journal of field reports, gear testing, and stories from athletes in the wild—creating an editorial dimension that builds community and brand loyalty. The final experience is more than just a store: it’s a digital basecamp for those who thrive above the tree line.

/portfolio/vesper-motion.title: Vesper Motion - My Framer Site
/portfolio/vesper-motion.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: We crafted a bold yet refined online presence for Noémie Leduc, a portrait and editorial photographer, by designing a digital space that mirrors her artistic sensitivity and visual depth.

The visual approach to this project was guided entirely by Noémie’s artistic identity. Her work is deeply emotional, often intimate, with a quiet strength that needed room to exist without interruption. The layout was kept spacious and fluid, letting images breathe without crowding the viewer. We built a structure that feels like a visual conversation—inviting, elegant, and warm. Color choices were muted, with soft neutrals acting as a canvas for her rich tones and nuanced light. Typography played a supporting role: refined, minimal, and deliberately quiet. Everything was built to elevate the work, not compete with it. From homepage to gallery views, every interaction was designed to feel thoughtful, seamless, and slow-paced, mirroring the introspective nature of her photography.

Beyond aesthetics, the challenge was to provide Noémie with a tool that could grow alongside her practice. We integrated a CMS tailored for photographers, allowing her to easily manage and update projects, testimonials, and exhibitions without touching the design integrity. Special attention was given to mobile layouts—ensuring that her photographs retain their emotional charge and composition on all screen sizes. Animations were subtle and used only when necessary: gentle fades, soft scrolls, minimal transitions. The site becomes more than just a portfolio; it’s a sensory experience and a personal archive. This collaboration was about building something enduring, functional, and alive—just like her work.

/portfolio/elyra-studio.title: Elyra Studio - My Framer Site
/portfolio/elyra-studio.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: For Atelier Kairo, a high-end eyewear boutique, the mission was to create a refined brand presence rooted in precision, style, and timeless design—offline and online.

The brand identity was conceived as an extension of the product itself: carefully crafted, sculptural, and quietly confident. We started by defining a visual language that could express elegance without excess—pairing geometric letterforms with organic accents, and drawing from architectural and artisanal references. The logotype is balanced and distinctive, built to sit comfortably on packaging, in-store displays, and digital interfaces. The color palette is understated yet rich—neutral tones inspired by raw materials like stone, metal, and leather. Every detail, from kerning to iconography, was refined to echo the boutique’s attention to craftsmanship. The result is a visual system that feels modern and elevated, with enough restraint to allow the product to lead.

To complement the identity, we designed a set of tactile, high-end brand assets: custom packaging, care cards, product tags, and campaign materials. Each item was treated as an object of its own, using textured paper stocks, blind embossing, and minimal printing to highlight quality over quantity. The photography direction was soft and editorial, focusing on the texture of the frames and the character of those who wear them. Across all touchpoints—print, signage, social templates, and campaign rollouts—the brand exudes a quiet luxury that doesn’t need to shout. The project became a full-spectrum collaboration, where every deliverable reinforces the same core feeling: restraint, timelessness, and presence.

/portfolio/léonie-flora.title: Léonie Flora - My Framer Site
/portfolio/léonie-flora.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Léonie Flora is a floral design studio creating immersive environments for events, spaces, and editorials. Granada was approached to craft a visual identity and digital portfolio that reflect the studio’s poetic and tactile approach to floral storytelling.

The project aimed to distill the ephemeral nature of floral work into a lasting digital presence. The website was designed like a moodboard — expressive, layered, and rich in detail. Soft transitions, textured backgrounds, and hand-drawn elements bring a sense of tactility to the screen. The typography is elegant but organic, shifting between structure and spontaneity. Every section is intentionally paced to evoke the quiet rhythm of nature — guiding the viewer with ease while celebrating the unique personality of each project.

Beyond the portfolio, the site introduces a deeper narrative: one rooted in emotion, intuition, and place. Editorial writing accompanies the visuals, describing not just what was made, but why. Whether it’s an intimate wedding, an art installation, or a retail window, each project is framed by its intention. The identity and color system were designed to adapt fluidly across touchpoints — from print materials to social campaigns — offering Léonie a cohesive yet living brand language. The result is a world that feels delicate, grounded, and unmistakably hers.

/portfolio/maison-calanès.title: Maison Calanès - My Framer Site
/portfolio/maison-calanès.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Maison Calanès elevates the art of pastry by blending French tradition with a contemporary aesthetic. Granada was commissioned to translate this elegance into a tailored visual identity and refined digital presence.

The goal was to design a website that reflects both the sophistication of the creations and the calm, intimate world of the brand. The layout is minimal yet immersive — a visual showcase crafted to feel like a display case. Every dessert is highlighted through careful photography, soft shadows, and a type system inspired by luxury publishing. The interactions are subtle and precise, echoing the care of a pastry chef’s gesture. The experience is calm, elegant, and sensory — while remaining intuitive for customers exploring the collection.

Editorial content played a key role in the project. A dedicated "Craft" section highlights the maison’s philosophy, artisanal techniques, and rare ingredients. Every element was designed to tell a story — poetic descriptions accompany each creation, inviting users into the world of Calanès. The user journey is optimized for made-to-order purchases, private events, and premium collaborations. The result is a digital identity that positions Maison Calanès as not just a luxury pastry house, but a cultural brand grounded in craft and beauty.

/portfolio/maison-alverra.title: Maison Alverrà - My Framer Site
/portfolio/maison-alverra.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Maison Alverra is a contemporary jewelry house blending timeless craftsmanship with a modern, sculptural aesthetic. Our goal was to reflect that duality through a refined and immersive digital experience.

We developed a visual identity that elevates the brand’s unique positioning — somewhere between art object and wearable elegance. The logo system is understated yet memorable, crafted to sit gracefully across packaging, digital, and print. A minimal color palette, dominated by warm neutrals and deep gold accents, allows the product to shine without distraction. Typography plays a key role, balancing serif elegance with geometric precision. Each touchpoint — from business cards to social visuals — carries the same quiet confidence, designed to evoke intimacy, refinement, and permanence.

On the digital side, we designed a brand presence that feels tactile and fluid. The site encourages slow exploration, with generous whitespace and cinematic transitions that mimic the unboxing of a fine object. Product pages focus on details — materiality, craftsmanship, origin — inviting visitors into the story behind each piece. A dedicated journal section shares the house’s inspirations, artisanal processes, and seasonal campaigns, reinforcing the artistic vision at the brand’s core. The result is a seamless blend of form and function, turning Maison Alverra’s online presence into an extension of its atelier.

/portfolio/le-sépia.title: Le Sépia - My Framer Site
/portfolio/le-sépia.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Le Sépia is a luxury spa hotel nestled in nature, designed for deep restoration and quiet elegance. Granada was entrusted with creating a digital identity and website experience that echoes the atmosphere of calm, refinement, and immersive escape.

The design direction embraced softness and serenity — every element was crafted to slow the scroll and invite contemplation. Muted color palettes inspired by mineral tones, warm neutrals, and natural textures reflect the tactile richness of the hotel's architecture and spa interiors. Motion is subtle, interfaces are discreet. The typography is understated and balanced, evoking silence and space. Layouts favor large imagery, quiet breathing room, and text that drifts across the page like mist. Every interaction, from the room gallery to the booking system, was polished to feel effortless yet elevated.

Le Sépia’s identity lives at the intersection of nature, design, and ritual. The content strategy was built around storytelling — from the sensory rituals of the spa to the culinary philosophy of the restaurant. Visual assets were art-directed to feel timeless and cinematic, blending indoor luxury with outdoor calm. Editorial modules invite guests to immerse themselves before they even arrive. Through a seamless mobile experience, intuitive structure, and a restrained visual voice, the website mirrors the hospitality offered in person: immersive, restorative, and deeply human.

/portfolio/elésiane.title: Elésiane - My Framer Site
/portfolio/elésiane.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h2: Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: Elesiane is a fine dining seafood restaurant where culinary artistry meets coastal elegance. Granada was commissioned to develop a refined visual identity and an immersive website experience that evoke the sensory richness of the ocean.

The creative direction centered around fluidity and restraint — capturing the essence of water without cliché. The design draws inspiration from tides, reflections, and maritime textures. Each page flows seamlessly into the next, with smooth scroll behavior and subtle hover effects that mirror the rhythm of the sea. The color palette leans into deep blues, off-whites, and shimmering silvers, reflecting both depth and clarity. Imagery is given space to breathe, with careful art direction that highlights the elegance of each dish and the ambiance of the restaurant itself.

To support Elesiane’s positioning as a destination restaurant, the website integrates storytelling with functionality. Visitors are introduced to the philosophy behind the menu, the seasonal sourcing of ingredients, and the chefs’ vision — all through an editorial lens. The typography combines classic serif fonts with refined sans-serifs, suggesting both heritage and modernity. From the online reservation flow to animated transitions that mimic ocean movement, every detail was designed to leave an impression of sophistication, calm, and sensory anticipation. Elesiane’s digital presence now reflects the poetic precision found in every plate.

h2: Accessing the website and Account security
Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: We may revise and update these Terms of Use from time to time in our sole discretion. We will post any changes to these Terms of Use in a notice of the change at the bottom of our web page with a hyperlink thereto. We will also send you an email describing such changes. Please regularly review these Terms of Use. Notwithstanding if you continue to use our Website, you are bound by any changes that we make to these terms of use.

However, any changes to the dispute resolution provisions set out in Governing Law andJurisdiction will not apply to any disputes for which the parties have actual notice on or before the date the change is posted on the Website.

We reserve the right to withdraw or amend this Website, and any service or material we provide on the Website, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of the Website is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of the Website, or the entire Website, to users, including registered users.
● Making all arrangements necessary for you to have access to the Website.
● Ensuring that all persons who access the Website through your internet connection are aware of these Terms of Use and comply with them.

To access the Website or some of the resources it offers, you may be asked to provide certain registration details or other information. It is a condition of your use of the Website that all the information you provide on the Website is correct, current, and complete. You agree that all information you provide to register with this Website or otherwise, including, but not limited to, through the use of any interactive features on the Website, is governed by our Privacy Policy (https://dyte.io/privacy-policy), and you consent to all actions we take with respect to your information consistent with our Privacy Policy.

If you choose, or are provided with, a user name, password, or any other piece of information aspart of our security procedures, you must treat such information as confidential, and you must not disclose it to any other person or entity. You also acknowledge that your account is personal to you and agree not to provide any other person with access to this Website or portions of it using your user name, password, or other security information. You agree to notify us immediately of any un authorized access to or use of your user name or password or any other breach of security. You also agree to ensure that you exit from your account at the end of each session. You should use particular caution when accessing your account from a public or shared computer so that others are not able to view or record your password or other personal information.

We have the right to disable any user name, password, or other identifier, whether chosen by you or provided by us, at any time in our sole discretion for any or no reason, including if, in our opinion, you have violated any provision of these Terms of Use.

The owner of the Website is based in the State of Delaware in the United States of America(“US”). Our Website is only available for use outside the European Union. excluding persons or countries on the sanctions list issued by the Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) (“Permitted Geographies”). Our Website is not available for use or download by residents of, visitors to, or your employees who reside in the European Union (collectively a “European”). If you are a European, please do not register, and/or use our Website. If you are a resident in the US or India, you must comply with these Terms of Use and our Privacy Policy. We make no claims that the Website or any of its content is accessible or appropriate outside of the Permitted Geographies. If you are a resident of any other country, please ensure compliance with all local laws prior to using our Website.

Subject to your compliance with this Terms of Use, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive, revocable, non-transferable, non-licensable, non-sub licensable license to access and use ourWebsite for your personal, non-commercial use only as specified in the section below, strictly in accordance with this Terms of Use.

When using and accessing our Website, you need to make sure that your internet connection is adequate. You are solely responsible for your internet connection including and not limited to the applicable charges, rates, tariffs, and other fees that might apply.

You acknowledge and agree that our Website is provided for your use. Except to the extent necessary to access and use our Website, nothing in this Terms of Use grants any title or ownership interest in or to any copyrights, patents, trademarks, trade secrets or other proprietary rights in or relating to our Website, whether expressly, by implication, estoppel, or otherwise.The Company and its licensors and service providers reserve and will retain their entire right, title, and interest in and to our Website including all copyrights, trademarks, and other intellectual property rights therein or relating thereto, except as expressly granted to you in thisTerms of Use.

The Website and its entire contents, features, and functionality (including but not limited to all information, software, text, displays, images, video, and audio, and the design, selection, and arrangement thereof) are owned by the Company, its licensors, or other providers of such material and are protected by US and international copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property or proprietary rights laws.

These Terms of Use permit you to use the Website for your personal, non-commercial use only. You must not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, republish, download, store, or transmit any of the material on our Website, except as follows:
● Your computer may temporarily store copies of such materials in RAM incidental to your accessing and viewing those materials.
● You may print or download one copy of a reasonable number of pages of the Website for your own personal, non-commercial use and not for further reproduction, publication, or distribution.

● If we provide desktop, mobile, or other applications for download, you may download a single copy to your computer or mobile device solely for your own personal, non-commercial use, provided you agree to be bound by our end user license agreement for such applications.

If you print, copy, modify, download, or otherwise use or provide any other person with access to any part of the Website in breach of the Terms of Use, your right to use the Website will stop immediately and you must, at our option, return or destroy any copies of the materials you have made. No right, title, or interest in or to the Website or any content on the Website is transferred to you, and all rights not expressly granted are reserved by the Company. Any use of the Website not expressly permitted by these Terms of Use is a breach of these Terms of Use and may violate copyright, trademark, and other laws.

Our failure to exercise or enforce any right or provision of this Terms of Use will not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. If any provision of this Terms of Use is found by a court of competent jurisdiction to be invalid, we both nevertheless agree that the court should endeavor to give effect to our intentions as reflected in this provision, and the other provisions of this Terms of Use to remain in full force and effect. You agree that regardless of any statute or law to the contrary, any claim or cause of action arising out of or related to use of our Website or this Terms of Use must be filed within one (1) year after such claim or cause of action arose or be forever barred. A party’s failure to act with respect to a breach by the other party does not constitute a waiver of the party’s right to act with respect to subsequent or similar breaches. All the sections intended to survive the termination of this Terms of Use shall survive. The section titles in this Terms of Use are for convenience only and have no legal or contractual effect. Except as explicitly stated otherwise, any notices to dyte, Inc. shall be given by certified mail, postage prepaid and return receipt requested to dyte, Inc. at 16192 Coastal Highway, Lewes, Delaware19958, USA. Any notices to you shall be provided to you through our Website or given to you via the email address or physical address you provide to the Company during the registration process.

/legal/privacy-policy.title: Zanzibar - Agancy and Portfolio Premium Framer Template
/legal/privacy-policy.description: The Zanzibar Framer template helps agencies and entrepreneurs showcase their work and convert visitors into clients, featuring pages for home, about, services, contact, and a portfolio collection.
h2: Information We Collect and How We Collect It
Finding the right place with clarity and style.
p: The terms "we," "our," and "us" refer to the owner of this website.
"Non-Personal Data" (NPD) refers to any information that is not in any way personally identifiable.

"Personal Data" (PD) means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person (the "data subject"); an identifiable natural person is one who can be identified, directly or indirectly, by reference to an identifier such as a name, an identification number, location data, an online identifier, or to one or more factors specific to the physical, physiological, genetic, mental, economic, cultural, or social identity of that natural person. PD is in many ways the same as Personally Identifiable Information (PII). However, PD has a broader scope and covers more data.

"Sensitive Personal Data" (SPD) includes a consumer's social security number, driver's license number, national identification card number, or passport number; a consumer's account log-in, financial account, debit card, or credit card number in combination with any required security code, access code, password, or credentials allowing access to an account; a consumer's precise geolocation; a consumer's racial or ethnic origin, religious or philosophical beliefs, or union membership; the contents of a consumer's mail, SMS, and email communications, unless the business is the intended recipient of the communication; a consumer's genetic data; the processing of biometric data for the purpose of uniquely identifying a consumer; personal information collected and analyzed concerning a consumer's health; sex life or sexual orientation. Sensitive personal information that is "publicly available" is still considered sensitive personal information or personal information

Contact us using the information provided at the top of this privacy statement to exercise any of your legal rights contained in this privacy statement. We will respond to your request within 30 days of receiving it.

When you use our website and submit personal data to us, you are entitled to certain rights under various privacy laws, including the European Union's General Data Protection Regulation (EU GDPR), the United Kingdom's General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR), the California Consumer Privacy Act (CaCPA), the California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA), the UK Data Protection Act 2018, the German Federal Data Protection Act (BDSG), the Canadian Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act (PIPEDA), the Australian Privacy Act 1988, and other global privacy laws. Even if not mentioned here, we will make reasonable efforts to honor access requests from data subjects, even if we have no legal obligation to do so. However, we reserve the right to deny any access request from a data subject that we are not legally obligated to comply with. Your rights may include, but are not limited to, the following:
● The right to equal service, price, and not to be discriminated against even if you exercise your privacy rights.

● The right to one or more means by which you can submit requests under this privacy statement, including (at a minimum) if the business operates an Internet website, a website address, and an email address.
● The right to know if your personal data is sold, shared, or disclosed, and to whom.
● The right to request that we do not sell or share any of your personal data.

● The right to request that we disclose the following personal information to you: the categories of personal information we have collected about you; the categories of sources from which your personal information is collected; the business or commercial purpose for collecting, selling, or sharing your personal information; the categories of third parties to whom we disclose your personal information; the specific pieces of personal information we have collected about you.
● The right to be informed about the personal data we collect from you and how we process it.
● The right to obtain confirmation that your personal data is being processed and to access your personal data.
● The right to have your personal data corrected if it is inaccurate or incomplete.

● The right to request the deletion or erasure of your personal data if there is no compelling reason for us to continue processing it. However, the right to erasure is not absolute and can be overridden in certain cases where we have a legal or overriding legitimate interest to continue processing your data.

● The right to request the personal data you have provided to us and to use it for your own purposes. Upon express request, we will provide your data to you or to another service or product provider within 30 days of your request, subject to compliance with trade secrets and industrial confidentiality.
● The right to object to the processing of your personal data for the following reasons:
● The right not to be subject to a decision based solely on automated processing, including profiling, that produces legal effects concerning you or similarly significantly affects you.
● The right to have us limit the collection of your personal data to what is "adequate, relevant, and reasonably necessary" in relation to the purposes for which the data is processed.

● The right to have us not process your personal data for purposes that are neither reasonably necessary nor compatible with the disclosed purposes for which that personal data is processed, unless the data controller obtains your consent.

● The right to designate an authorized agent to make a request on your behalf. When you designate an authorized agent, you must provide a valid power of attorney, a valid government-issued ID of the requester, and a valid government-issued ID of the authorized agent.
The right to lodge a complaint with supervisory authorities if your information has not been processed in accordance with your rights under privacy laws.
Our Legal Basis for Collecting and Processing Personal Data

Our legal basis for collecting and processing your personal data when you purchase our products and services or fill out any of the contact forms on our website is based on the necessity to perform a contract or to take steps to enter into a contract. Our legal basis for collecting and processing your personal data when you sign up for our newsletter, download free information, and access free audio, video, and other technologies via our website is based on consent.

We automatically receive information from your web browser or mobile device. This information may include the IP address of your computer/proxy server that you use to access the Internet, your Internet provider's name, your web browser type, your mobile device type, your computer operating system, and data about your browsing activity when using our website. We use all this information to improve our website.

Our website uses cookies. A cookie is a small data piece or text file downloaded to your computer or mobile device when you access certain websites. Cookies may contain text that can be read by the web server that delivered the cookie to you. The text contained in the cookie generally consists of a string of letters and numbers that uniquely identifies your computer or mobile device; it may also contain other information.

By agreeing to our use of cookies, you are granting us and the third parties we work with permission to place, store, and access some or all of the cookies described below on your computer and/or mobile device.

We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. If our company decides to change this privacy policy, we will post those changes on our website so that our users and customers are always aware of what information we collect, use, and disclose.

If, at any time, we decide to disclose or use your personal data in a different manner than specified at the time it was collected, we will notify you in advance by email sent to the email address registered in your account. Otherwise, we will use and disclose our users' and customers' personal data in accordance with the privacy policy that was in effect when the information was collected. In all cases, your continued use of our website, services, and products after any modification to this privacy policy will constitute your acceptance of such modification.
If you have any questions about our privacy policy, please contact us using the information provided at the top of this privacy policy.

/about.title: Mascara — Visual Studio & Creative Portfolio Framer Template
/about.description: Mascara is a refined Framer template for video creators, photographers, agencies, and freelancers. Featuring dynamic CMS pages, Mascara helps you engage your audience, highlight your services, and present your portfolio with clarity and impact.
h2: We Design Solutions Made for You
Finding the right place with clarity and style.
h3: Cinematic storytelling crafted to capture emotion
Editorial photography designed to elevate identity
Strategic visual content built to communicate value
p: How digital strategy helps brands grow more effectively online
Why good web design is essential for today’s digital businesses

Mascara is a creative agency built around the idea that strong visuals are not just seen, but felt. We craft imagery and films that translate identity into emotion, helping brands express who they are with precision and intention. From concept to final delivery, every project is approached as a story to be shaped with care, balance, and a deep understanding of visual language.

“At Mascara, we believe the most powerful visuals are those that feel effortless and true,” says the Creative Director of Mascara. “Our work is guided by instinct, experience, and an obsession with detail. We don’t chase trends—we focus on creating images that resonate, endure, and naturally align with the essence of each brand we collaborate with.”

Timeless yet distinctive, our style is defined by clean compositions, thoughtful pacing, and a refined sense of atmosphere. We blend classic visual principles with a contemporary sensitivity, creating work that feels both familiar and unexpected. The result is imagery that stands out without forcing attention—subtle, confident, and designed to remain relevant over time.

Mascara is a collective of filmmakers, photographers, and creatives driven by collaboration and craft. Each project benefits from diverse perspectives, shared standards of excellence, and a unified passion for creating meaningful visual experiences.
We prioritize close collaboration with you at every step, and we make sure each elements from the projects are perfectly aligned with your expectations.
